{# Override for sphinx_book_theme's components/author.html. The theme's stock template renders {{ translate('By') }} {{ author }}, and Sphinx's bundled Korean message catalog translates the standalone string "By" as "으로" (a postposition meaning roughly "by means of"), which reads as a mistranslation when placed in front of a person's name in the footer ("으로 Ji-Ho Lee" does not read naturally as "By Ji-Ho Lee" does in English). This override sidesteps that catalog entry entirely and picks the correct phrasing directly from Sphinx's `language` config value: "작성자: " for Korean builds, "By " otherwise. #} {% if author %}

{% if language == 'ko' %}작성자: {{ author }}{% else %}By {{ author }}{% endif %}

{% endif %}
